programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?
programme.desc: Alex juggles a lot as Loren recovers; Rob and Sophie's sexy fun ends badly; Mahmoud accuses Nicole of cheating; traditions raise tensions in Emily's family; everything is on the line for Angela and Michael as his final visa interview approaches.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Jennifer Hudson Show
programme.desc: Actor Tyriq Withers (Colleen Hoover film adaptation "Reminders of Him"); Courtney Austin, a deaf medical student about to graduate, formed a life-changing bond with Dr. Ebone Bady, a pediatric ENT surgeon; their mentorship went viral as they showed that disabilities are not limitations and that accessibility in medicine matters.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil takes Jay on an unconventional fishing trip; Gloria wonders how to break the news about her pregnancy; Dylan temporarily moves in with the Dunphys; Cam and Mitch think about adopting a cat.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil gets a vasectomy; Gloria and Jay can't agree on whether or not they should find out the sex of the baby; Mitchell tries to steer Cameron toward getting a part-time job.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and Phil embarrass Haley when they drop her off at college; Manny makes Gloria and Jay take a class; Lily gets into a tussle on her first day of kindergarten.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil can't accept that Luke wants to quit magic; Gloria's snoring keeps Jay and Manny awake; Mitch and Cam struggle to deal with their reversed role.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Extreme Cougar Wives
programme.desc: Hattie, a 76-year-old cougar, has been dating younger men for more than 20 years; Stephanie, 65, lost her husband unexpectedly and has since sworn to date only younger men; Jude, 53, has fallen in love with her daughter's junior-high boyfriend.

programme.title: Extreme Cougar Wives
programme.desc: Jane and her 27-year-old husband are Civil War reenactors; Loma wears leopard print bras and blonde wigs; Sheri has found her soul mate in a 26-year-old.

programme.title: Extreme Cougar Wives
programme.sub-title: I'm Here to Inspire, Not Expire!
programme.desc: Kathy, 54, dates a 25-year-old; Jeraldine created "The Love Boat" series and at 90 years old enjoys life with her Latin lover; Gale found happiness with a man who is closer in age to her teen daughter.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant
programme.desc: A woman misses her period but a home pregnancy test is negative, so she thinks it must be the stress of her upcoming wedding until a few months later when she is shocked to find herself delivering a baby girl while on the toilet.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant
programme.desc: After returning home from spring break, a college freshman begins to suffer painful back cramps but does not realize she's pregnant until she gives birth to a boy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant
programme.desc: After spending a day with her family riding roller coasters at a theme park, a woman suddenly feels exhausted and nauseous, begins having cramps, heads to the bathroom, and gives birth to a baby boy on the floor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant
programme.desc: A pregnant woman suffers strokes and a heart attack.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unexpected
programme.desc: Bella delivers baby Wes via C-section while Hunter hopes his dad will come to meet his grandson. Mia's graduation is overshadowed by her mom's behavior. Amya faces mounting pressure as postpartum and weight gain struggles begin to take a toll.

programme.title: Unexpected
programme.desc: Isabella shuts Bryce out before her induction; Mia endures a long, stressful labor that leads to an emergency C-section; Amya's insecurities about her post-baby weight derail date night with Jose.

programme.desc: As Mia recovers from her C-section, family tensions flare when Nicole's absence causes hurt on both sides; Bella faces a pregnancy scare; Amya's struggles with her post-pregnancy body; Isabella braces for labor amid Bryce's family drama.

programme.sub-title: Between the Sheets: The Act of Monkey Barring

programme.title: 90 Day: The Single Life
programme.sub-title: Between the Sheets: The Act of Cobwebbing

programme.desc: Natalie questions her relationship with Gino when her daughter isn't on board; Vanja storms out of their dance class when Tony embarrasses her; Kim gives Jamal and Larry an update on her daughter; Cortney agrees to help Colt one last time.
